narrative:
Berlin Twp township has 8,512 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.4 percentage points.
